text: Recently, I had the pleasure of joining
a live stream with the chairman of the
Pendragon Foundation, Dr. Nathan Hood.
The Pendragon Foundation is a charitable
organization with the focus of
rebuilding Britain's strongholds. They
partner with local groups and national
bodies to construct a coalition of
businesses, charities, and community
organizations to deliver an ambitious
program of restoration and regeneration
across Britain. It is a great
organization that I fully support and
encourage you to go check him out. And
this video is the discussion I had with
Nathan on the true definition of what a
castle is. So, I hope you enjoy.
